summary: Iteration 151: Daily Quest System (Wellness-to-RPG Habit Loop) - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests passed covering quest endpoints, wellness hooks, deduplication, Perfect Day bonus, and streak tracking. Frontend: All UI elements verified - Quests tab is default, shows 6 quests with completion status, Perfect Day progress bar, streak counter, XP multiplier, and 3-Breath Reset button.
test_credentials: kyndsmiles@gmail.com / password (existing user), ui_quest_test_189e11@test.com / password123 (new test user)
seed_data_creation: Created fresh test users for clean quest state testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Quest System fully implemented and tested. Backend routes at /app/backend/routes/rpg.py lines 866-1130. Frontend at /app/frontend/src/pages/RPGPage.js. Key data-testids: tab-quests, quest-{id}, perfect-day-progress, breath-reset-btn, complete-quest-{id}. Quest IDs: meditation, journal, mood, breathing, soundscape, breath_reset. Wellness endpoints (moods, journal, meditation-history/log) auto-trigger quest completion via quest_xp field in response.

GET /api/rpg/quests/daily.details: Returns all 6 quests with completion status, streak info, pillars_done, perfect_day flag

POST /api/rpg/quests/complete.details: Marks quest as completed, awards XP with multiplier, returns quest_id, xp_awarded, currency_awarded, streak_days

POST /api/rpg/quests/breath-reset.details: Awards +10 XP for micro-quest, deduplication works

GET /api/rpg/quests/streak.details: Returns streak days, multiplier, and history

Quest deduplication.details: Completing same quest twice in a day returns 400 error

Wellness hooks - POST /api/moods.details: Auto-triggers 'mood' quest, returns quest_xp field with xp_awarded

Perfect Day bonus.details: Completing all 5 pillars awards +100 XP bonus, perfect_day flag set to true

Streak tracking.details: Streak increments on consecutive days, multiplier caps at 2.5x

Quests tab default.details: Quests tab is the default tab when loading /rpg

Quest list.details: All 6 quests displayed with names, descriptions, XP values, PILLAR badges

Quest completion status.details: Shows 'Done' for completed quests, XP value for pending

Perfect Day progress.details: Shows pillars done/total and XP bonus info

Streak counter.details: Shows 'Day Streak' with current streak days

3-Breath Reset button.details: Shows when not completed, hidden when done

Quest notification badge.details: Shows remaining quests count on Quests tab

Tab switching.details: All tabs (Character, Inventory, World, Bosses, Circle) switch correctly
